panel.title: Your week
panel.subtitle: Today

tasks.label: New booking synced across your tools

panel.metricLabel: tasks handled today, untouched by hand

problemSolution.problemBody: Chasing payments across three apps. Re-keying the same data into systems that should talk to each other. Following up by hand. Reading documents one by one. Reconciling at midnight in a spreadsheet. Every hour on operational busywork is an hour not spent growing the business.
problemSolution.solutionHeadline: Days of manual work, down to minutes.
problemSolution.solutionBody: Scheduling, follow-ups, billing, reading documents, copying data, matching payments — we connect the tools you already use and take the repetitive work off your hands, so it runs without you. Tavros went from three days of matching payments to twelve minutes. And when the bottleneck isn't busywork — documents AI should be reading, a site that doesn't win the client, security you keep postponing — we build that too.

services.headline: What we take off your plate.
services.description: Every service comes with receipts: real results from real clients, not numbers from a pitch deck.

items.name: Automate the busywork
items.description: The repetitive work that eats your week — scheduling, follow-ups, billing, and the rest — running on its own while you sleep.
items.proof: KrakenBay saves 30+ hours/week on scheduling and billing alone.

items.name: Put AI to work
items.description: AI where it actually pays off: reading documents, drafting replies, sending each request to the right place, and answering questions from your own files — so your team skips the repetitive judgment calls.
items.proof: Reading documents that used to take an afternoon now clears itself in minutes.

items.name: Get your tools talking
items.description: Your tools should work together. We connect your bookings to your calendar, payments to your books, and sales to delivery — so nothing falls through the cracks.
items.proof: Inmovilia's sales-to-construction handoff went from days to instant.

items.name: Payments, matched for you
items.description: Stop matching payments by hand. Every payment across your terminal, your bank, and every app — matched and checked automatically.
items.proof: Tavros cut billing cycles by 3x, with no more chasing late renewals.

items.name: A presence that wins clients
items.description: Landing pages, client portals, and portfolio sites built to win work. If your online presence doesn't match the quality of what you do, we fix that too.
items.proof: Eternus went from a mismatched page to a portfolio that closes clients.

items.name: Lock down your business
items.description: We audit where you're exposed — access, backups, payments, the data your business runs on — and close the gaps before they cost you. Security that holds up when a client or partner asks.
items.proof: REPLACE WITH REAL RECEIPT — security/audit client result.

items.name: Get your team up to speed
items.description: We train your people to actually run what we build — AI tools, new workflows, the systems behind the business — so the gains stick long after we're gone.
items.proof: REPLACE WITH REAL RECEIPT — training client result.

items.name: Cut the bottlenecks
items.description: We find where the work gets stuck, redesign how it flows, and cut the wasted time and cost — in ways you can measure.
items.proof: Most clients recover the project's cost within the first 60 days.

clients.headline: In their words.
clients.sectionSub: Four businesses, four different stacks, one outcome: hours back and nothing slipping through the cracks.

items.quote: The cash floating around, the terminal, tickets, bank apps. I needed all of that to know my in-out expenses. I don't have any clue how they did all of that automatically.
The Æther team helped me reduce what usually took me weeks in reconciliation each month. Now I focus on what I care about: bringing more clients to my business.
I didn't even have a web page! I contacted them and in a couple of hours I was able to send the link to my investors. They saved me.
They helped me actually have a portfolio for my work. My old landing page wasn't aligned to what I do. Now both match!

process.headline: From audit to running system.
process.description: Three weeks to first results, not a six-month rollout. Every engagement runs the same three steps.
deliverables: You get: a build plan + fixed quote
You get: a live system, monitored

steps.title: Discover
steps.description: We audit your current workflows end-to-end. Every manual step, every bottleneck, every dollar leaking through the cracks, mapped and quantified.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: We architect the right solution — automation, AI, software, or web — tailored to your stack and how your business actually runs.

steps.title: Deploy
steps.description: We launch, monitor, and iterate. Your systems run 24/7 while we handle maintenance, optimization, and whatever breaks at 3 AM.

checkFit.headline: Who we work with.
checkFit.description: We go deep with a handful of clients at a time — so we're honest about the fit, both ways.
checkFit.soundLikeYou: If the left column is you, we should talk.
audiences: You're scaling faster than your systems, team, or tools can keep up
You run a real business (gym, clinic, real estate) buried in manual work
Your site, your data, or your security doesn't match the quality of what you do
Your time is worth more than another hour of admin — or another postponed fix
notAudiences: You're shopping for the cheapest quote, not the best system
You want a tool to run yourself, not a partner who owns it
You're not ready to change how the work actually gets done
You need a one-off favor, not an ongoing relationship

contact.headline: Tell us where the hours go.
contact.description: Book the free 20-minute audit: we map where your week leaks hours — and what it's costing you. You keep that map whether you hire us or not. If there's nothing worth building, we'll tell you straight. No pitch.
contact.messagePlaceholder: A few lines on what's manual, what's breaking, or where your week disappears.
contact.responseNote: We reply within one business day.
steps: Free 20-minute audit: we map where your hours and money leak.
You keep the findings and get a fixed quote. No pitch if it's not worth it.
contact.success: Thank you. We'll reply within one business day.
contact.error: Something went wrong and your message didn't send. Email us instead and we'll take it from there.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.messageRequired: Please tell us what's slowing you down.
validation.messageShort: A little more detail helps — at least 10 characters.

integrations.headline: We connect the tools you already pay for.
integrations.subcopy: Stripe to your bank, your calendar to your CRM, your sales to your books — talking to each other automatically, so nothing slips through the cracks.

faq.headline: Questions, answered.
faq.subhead: The things founders ask us before booking the audit.

items.a: No — we're a full studio. AI and agents, automation, integrations, custom software and landing pages, security and audits, and training your team to run it all. Automation is often where we start, because it pays for itself fastest, and we build out from there.
First results live within 2-3 weeks of kickoff. Most engagements deliver measurable hours saved inside 30 days, not the 6-month rollouts you'd get from a traditional agency.

Engagements start around $4,500 and scale with scope. Most clients recover the cost in the first 60 days through reclaimed hours and reduced billing leakage. We share a fixed quote after the free audit, with no hourly games.

items.q: Will this work with our current tools?
items.a: Almost certainly. We connect Stripe, HubSpot, Notion, Airtable, QuickBooks, Slack, Google Workspace, n8n, Zapier, Make, and 100+ others. If your stack has an API or a webhook, we can automate, connect, or build on it.

We monitor every workflow we ship. If something fails at 3 AM, we get paged, not you. Maintenance and small iterations are included in the first 90 days; after that, ongoing support is a flat monthly retainer.
No. We replace the work nobody on your team should be doing. Your people get to focus on customers, growth, and judgment calls, the things software can't do.

Yes. We work inside your accounts (or deploy to your infrastructure), never store credentials in plaintext, and sign an NDA on day one. We can also work under your existing security and compliance requirements.

footer.tagline: We build and run the technology your business depends on — AI, automation, software, and security. Based in Guadalajara, working with teams everywhere.
footer.dataUse: Æther operates internal integration software that connects Google Workspace — Gmail, Google Calendar, and Google Drive — to the automated workflows we build and run for our clients. We access Google user data only to perform the automations each client authorizes, and our use of it follows the Google API Services User Data Policy, including the Limited Use requirements.

notFound.title: This page slipped through the cracks.
notFound.description: The link is broken or the page has moved. Let's get you back to something useful.
